title: Nakhon Ratchasima、Nakhon Ratchasima — 生活成本、住房與搬遷指南 [2026]
description: Nakhon Ratchasima、Nakhon Ratchasima的完整指南：生活成本、房價、社區、遠程工作準備情況和搬遷建議。
content:
概述

Nakhon Ratchasima是Nakhon Ratchasima的一個城市，人口約450,000。Known as Korat, this gateway to northeastern Thailand offers a very affordable lifestyle with access to both urban amenities and natural attractions like Khao Yai National Park.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
